user_request: What are the main risks identified in the report?

messages.content: What are the main risks identified in the report?

The report identifies three main risks: supply chain disruptions due to geopolitical tensions, increasing regulatory compliance costs in the EU market, and talent retention challenges in the engineering team.

context_blocks.content: Risk Assessment Summary: 1) Supply chain disruptions from geopolitical tensions remain the top concern. 2) EU regulatory compliance costs are expected to increase by 20% in 2026. 3) Engineering talent retention is challenged by competitive market.
